subject: feat(icons): signature-stroke icon concept
body:
Replaces the three-bars design with a stylized signature — two cursive humps
with a flourish tail in accent, above a thin baseline in secondary, on
base-300. Reads as "sign here" — the universal shorthand for agreement
execution and directly on-theme for Sancio.

Tags: ui, icons
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
